display_name: Northern Plains Tribal Health Region B

sources.population: U.S. Census Bureau ACS 2020-2024. Rolette County ND population ~14,600 plus off-reservation tribal members ~15,500 total service area.
sources.ethnicity: U.S. Census Bureau ACS 2020-2024. Rolette County ND: American Indian/Alaska Native 74.3%, white 21.4%, other 4.3%.
sources.sex_ratio: U.S. Census Bureau ACS 2020-2024. Rolette County ND female proportion: 50.8%.
sources.age_distribution: U.S. Census Bureau ACS 2020-2024. Rolette County ND median age 31.2 years. ICU cohort age bands: 55% 65+, 45% 18-64.
sources.diabetes: Indian Health Service. IHS Trends in Indian Health 2014-2015. Aberdeen Area AI/AN diabetes prevalence 14.5%. CDC 2022: AI/AN 14.7% vs 7.5% non-Hispanic white.
sources.hypertension: Espey DK et al. Am J Public Health. 2014;104(S3):S303-S311. Cardiovascular disease mortality elevated 1.2x. HTN estimated ~35-40% adult AI/AN.
sources.sepsis_burden: Brinkworth JF, Shaw JG. Am J Biol Anthropol. 2022;178(S74):230-255.
sources.rural_flag: HRSA Rural Health Grants Eligibility. Rolette County ND designated rural.
sources.IHS_context: Indian Health Service Aberdeen Area. Northern Plains tribal population Service Unit, Northern Plains. PHS Act Title V tribal health program.
sources.afebrile_elderly: Gavazzi G, Krause KH. Lancet Infect Dis. 2002;2(11):659-666.
sources.infection_source: Rhee C et al. JAMA Intern Med. 2017;177(7):944-951. Rural adjustment applied.
sources.lab_floors: WBC: Singer 2016. Glucose: ADA 2024. Creatinine: KDIGO 2022. LDL: Grundy 2019.

calibration_notes: Diabetes prevalence 14.7% AI/AN vs 7.5% non-Hispanic white — documented gap in engine
Northern Plains tribal population has higher white proportion than Northern Plains tribal population — reflected in ethnicity weights
Pneumonia and skin/soft tissue infections upweighted for rural + DM burden
Air-gapped IHS/tribal network is primary deployment target

continuous_vars._source: IHS Trends in Indian Health 2014-2015; NHANES AI/AN oversampling; Strong Heart Study ND data.

hba1c.source: IHS Aberdeen Area; slightly lower mean than Northern Plains tribal population due to higher white admixture (21.4%)

bmi.source: BRFSS AI/AN oversampling; Strong Heart Study; moderate-high obesity burden

systolic_bp.source: Strong Heart Study ND AI/AN; Espey 2014; HTN estimated 35-40% AI/AN

creatinine.source: NHANES AI/AN CKD data; moderate CKD burden; KDIGO 2022

egfr.source: IHS CKD surveillance; CKD-EPI 2021; CKD stage 3+ elevated in AI/AN DM+HTN population

temporal_trends._source: IHS trend data; CDC AI/AN surveillance; CMS Part D AI/AN utilization; BRFSS AI/AN oversampling

disease_prevalence_shift._unit: absolute prevalence change (fraction) at 6-month drift interval

prescription_shift._unit: relative change fraction at 6-month drift interval

6.source: IHS trends 2024; CDC AI/AN Diabetes Surveillance; BRFSS AI/AN 2022

disease_prevalence_shift._unit: absolute prevalence change (fraction) at 12-month drift interval

prescription_shift._unit: relative change fraction at 12-month drift interval

12.source: IHS trends 2024; CDC AI/AN Diabetes Surveillance; BRFSS AI/AN 2022

disease_prevalence_shift._unit: absolute prevalence change (fraction) at 18-month drift interval

prescription_shift._unit: relative change fraction at 18-month drift interval

18.source: IHS trends 2024; CDC AI/AN Diabetes Surveillance; BRFSS AI/AN 2022
